_provenance.source: Hand-authored. Bounded vocabulary for SpoolInterpretation. failure_category mirrors FailureCategory enum in flow_ml/data/schemas.py (12 values incl. Smart/RESTART subcategories synced from flow-studio/docs/smart-restart/messages.md).

return_code.rationale: z/OS return codes are conventionally 4-character strings; null is allowed when the spool didn't expose one (e.g. abend before completion).

confidence.calibration_note: 0.9+ when the spool clearly indicates the cause; 0.7-0.9 on plausible reads; <0.7 when the spool is ambiguous or truncated.

explanation.sentence_target: 2-4 sentences walking through the chain of events; distinct from `summary` (1-sentence recap).
explanation.rationale: Added in v2 — the original spec calls for narrative reasoning so operators can audit the model's interpretation.

related_docs_catalog._note: Doc keys (not URLs) the runtime maps to actual help links at render time. Seed builder draws from these per failure category.
